---
title: "Presentations"
listing:
  contents:
    - "*/index.qmd"
  type: table
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [title, date, categories, description]
---

Welcome! This site hosts slide decks built with Quarto RevealJS. See the table above for available decks.

To add a new deck, copy `_templates/revealjs-deck/` to a top-level folder such as `cgvc2026/`, then edit `index.qmd`.
